dotnet: Colton has 5/5 expertise in C# and the .NET ecosystem, including .NET 9. He's built high-scale financial logistics platforms and royalty payout engines.
kotlin: Colton uses Kotlin (4/5) for high-scale services, often with Micronaut and Jetpack Compose. He's currently building TaskFlow with a Kotlin backend.
proxmox: Colton is a Proxmox enthusiast! He manages his own home lab and uses virtualization to test infrastructure as code.
skills: Key skills: C#/.NET 9, Kotlin, SQL/Postgres, Azure Event Hubs/Kafka, Docker/Proxmox, and GitHub Actions CI/CD.
projects: Notable projects: AutoNotes (AI Engine), Setlist Bot (Discord), and TaskFlow (Task Management).
experience: Colton has worked at a Logistics Brokerage, the Texas State Government, and a Music/Media tech platform.
contact: You can reach Colton at coltonchrane@gmail.com or find him on GitHub at github.com/coltonchrane.
location: Colton is based in Austin, TX, but spends time on his family ranch in Abilene.
